neighbors.name: Murrieta Javier & Janice Bowman
neighbors.claims: Original claims regarding out-of-state residency in Piedmont, Alabama, and joint parcel ownership in Polk County could not be substantiated. Public records searched yielded no verifiable matching property or residency records for these individuals within the specified jurisdiction.

approach_recommendations.engage: Attempt to verify exact identity and property ownership through updated municipal assessor records before planning direct outreach.

neighbors.name: White Elmont & Geraldine
neighbors.claims: Public obituary records indicate that Elmont and Geraldine White are residents of nearby Dallas, Georgia ([Hockenson Obituary](https://www.samclarkfuneralhome.com/obituaries/Hjalmer-Hockenson)). The drafted claim regarding their decades-long residence in Polk County could not be verified, as the originally cited obituary for Ernest Albert White does not mention them.

approach_recommendations.engage: Verify parcel ownership. If verified as owners living in nearby Dallas, GA, initiate respectful correspondence focused on preserving rural character.

citations.claim: Public obituary records indicate that Elmont and Geraldine White are residents of nearby Dallas, Georgia
